svg.title: Phason healing length and lumen scale
svg.metadata: Volume 1 Chapter 7 / Appendix K phason profile schematic.
svg.text: Phason healing length and lumen scale
Localized transverse profile: xi = a0/alpha; 2 xi aligns with the microtubule lumen scale.
Interpretation: quantitative boundary-condition correlation only; not a first-principles derivation of the lumen geometry.
